SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-03-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAMIRA DAVISI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAOLO COSTA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED A SETTLEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED IN THIS MATTER AND IS REQUESTING A PROGRESS REPORT DATE TO ENSURE PAYMENT IS MADE BY 2/28/25. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THIS MATTER, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,804.52 FILED BY DARVISHI, SAMIRA AS TO DEFENDANT COSTA, PAOLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DARVISHI, SAMIRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COSTA, PAOLO $7,098.58 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,173.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF SAMIRA DARVISHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAOLO COSTA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DARVISHI, SAMIRA
